overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a brown leather jacket and cowboy hat walking through a historic New Orleans-style city at night. The wet cobblestone streets reflect the warm glow of gas street lamps as the character explores the atmospheric urban environment, encountering a horse-drawn carriage and approaching a grand hotel.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with tram tracks

events.description: character turns left at the intersection onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the wet cobblestone street toward a large lit building, then turning left onto the sidewalk

entered.detail: large three-story building with lit windows and decorative architecture at the end of the street
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light
two-story brick building with arched windows
metal railway tracks embedded in the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the center of a wet cobblestone street at night, approaching a large ornate building illuminated by warm gas lamps. The street features embedded tram tracks and brick buildings line the left side. Around 8 seconds, the character turns left onto the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along historic street with storefronts

events.description: horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead and passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the left sidewalk past wooden chairs and storefronts

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving from center to right, passing the character

entered.detail: raised wooden plank walkway in front of buildings
wooden rocking chairs sitting on the sidewalk
black carriage with large wheels pulled by horses
cylindrical metal garbage bin on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the left sidewalk past historic storefronts with wooden chairs outside. A horse-drawn carriage approaches from the distance and passes by on the right side of the street. The ornate building from the previous segment falls behind as the character continues down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined historic street with iron balconies

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past buildings with wrought iron balconies

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

tall trees lining the right side of the street
wooden wagon with red wheels parked on the side

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the historic street, passing buildings with distinctive wrought iron balconies and street trees on the right. A pedestrian in light clothing walks in the opposite direction. A wooden cart with red wheels is parked on the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching grand hotel building

events.description: street opens into a wider plaza area with a large multi-story building ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large illuminated hotel building at the end of the street

entered.detail: tall multi-story building with many lit windows and grand architecture
building with classical stone columns on the right side

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wider plaza area as the character approaches a grand multi-story hotel building with numerous illuminated windows. The surroundings become more open with a large stone building visible on the right. The character continues walking toward the large hotel as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, lamp-lit historic district that gradually opens into a wide urban plaza. It begins with the character walking down the center of a wet cobblestone street embedded with tram tracks, moving toward a large ornate building before turning left onto the sidewalk. As the character passes historic storefronts with wooden chairs, a horse-drawn carriage approaches from the distance and glides past on the right. The scene then shifts past buildings featuring distinctive wrought iron balconies and street trees, passing a pedestrian and a red-wheeled wooden cart parked along the way. Finally, the street expands into a wider plaza area, leading the character toward a grand multi-story hotel with numerous illuminated windows and a large stone building to the right.
